caption: A man wearing a dark blazer over a light-colored shirt and a lanyard stands on a stage in front of a large screen. In the initial scene, the screen displays the words "CODE" and "SLIDES" along with two GitHub URLs. As the sequence progresses, the screen changes to a slide titled "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING," which lists the roles and affiliations of "Alejandro Saucedo," including "CTO Exponential Technologies," "Chairman The Institute for Ethical AI & ML," and "Fellow (AI, Data & ML) The RSA," alongside his email "A@E-X.IO." He is also associated with the "TeensinAI.com initiative." At the bottom of the screen, a banner contains the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018." The man gestures with his hands while speaking, shifting his position and posture as he presents the information to an unseen audience.
